title: Uyyala Jampala
desc: When Suri learns that his cousin Uma is seeing someone, he decides to investigate and learns that the guy is a fraud. When Uma elopes with the boy, Suri tracks her down and tries to expose her lover.

title: Adipurush
desc: Adipurush - 2023 - A modern adaptation of the Indian epic Ramayana which follows the exiled prince Raghav's journey to rescue his wife Janaki from the demon king Lankesh.

title: Raja the Great
desc: Raja, a person with visual impairment, is skilled and sets out on a mission to rescue a girl, Lucky, the pampered daughter of a sincere police officer.

title: Intlo Illalu Vantintlo Priyuralu
desc: When Sita is unable to bear a child, her husband, Sriram, gets married to Manisha. They have a son and Sriram decides to adopt him while hiding the truth from Sita.

title: F2: Fun and Frustration
desc: Two young men hope to control their wives after their respective marriages. However, their chauvinistic attitude often lands them in hilarious situations.

title: Kantara
desc: When greed paves the way for betrayal, scheming and murder, a young tribal reluctantly dons the traditions of his ancestors to seek justice.

title: Saamy 2
desc: Ramasamy, who works as a front-end receptionist for Union Minister Viswanathan, decides to pursue civil service. Soon, Viswanathan's daughter falls in love with him after he saves her from gangsters.

title: Yentha Vaadu Gaani
desc: Sathyadev, an honest police officer, is on a mission to stop an organ trafficking racket, unaware that the mastermind is the same person who killed his beloved.

title: Dhurandar
desc: The presenter discusses the film 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' in terms of its OTT and television release and also talks about its teaser.

title: Masthi Maja
desc: A fun compilation of back-to-back hilarious Telugu movie scenes, bringing nonstop laughter with the funniest moments, comic sequences, and iconic reactions.

title: Gautamiputra Satakarni
desc: Gautamiputra Satakarni who is the emperor of the kingdom of Satavahana, faces several threats and tries to overcome them during his attempts to unite all the kingdoms.

title: Savyasachi
desc: One of Vikram's hands is not under the control of his mind. Being a victim of vanishing twin syndrome, Vikram's unseen twin brother comes through for him in the time of need.

title: Nuvvu Naaku Nachav
desc: Venky, an unemployed youth, heads to Hyderabad for a marriage ceremony. What seems like a brief vacation gradually turns into something more, when the soon-to-be bride falls for him.

title: Touch Chesi Chudu
desc: Karthikeya, a man who is devoted to his family, faces a huge challenge as his violent and turbulent past begins to resurface.

title: Balagam
desc: A young man in severe debt believes that the only way to pay it off is through the dowry from his impending marriage. However, the death of his grandfather puts his plan on hold.

title: Bhadrakali
desc: When a mentally unstable woman becomes the cause of their daughter's death, the husband divorces her and marries another. However, when the new wife falls sick, the former partner comes to her rescue.
